race.comment: BONNIE BOUQUET (9) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in four of her past five outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Comes right into this race now with with a couple of key scratchings and looks well weighted with the claim. Rates the testing material against this line-up. CIPHER DASH (3) was at cricket score odds on debut but defied expectations when hitting the frame around this circuit. Better for that hit-out and can feature again with natural improvement. ALL BANGED UP (1) has the benefit of the claim from the inside marble and should give backers a sight. JUNGLE WONDER (2) next in line with that debut effort now in the locker.
